job_title: View job: Scientist 2-Spatial Biology and Biophysics
job_description:
• 3+ years of relevant experience in situ hybridization, imaging and spatial techniques, preferably in the Biotechnology industry.
• Strong analytical background Strong organizational skills.
• Strong written and oral communication skills.
• Strong troubleshooting and problem solving skills.
• Experience with the 10x Genomics Xenium platform is a plus.
• Skills in image analysis are a plus.
• PhD in Molecular Biology, Biophysics, Physical Chemistry or related field.
• Proven ability to design novel molecular biology assay schemes, as evidenced by peer-reviewed publications or published patents.

job_title: View job: Production Test Technician-Instrument Assembly
job_description:
• 2 years associate degree or 1+ years of technician experience in capital equipment production field.
• Hands on experience on assembly and/or testing of complex electromechanical/optic systems.
• Hands on experience using basic hand tools to assemble and disassemble equipment, including screwdrivers, wrenches, torque-wrenches, soldering equipment, wiring tools, etc.
• Basic trouble shooting skills on electrical/electronic/mechanical/laser/optic system.
• Strong team collaboration skills, detail-oriented and excellent organization and prioritization skills.
• Strong communication skills: listening, speaking, writing, and interacting.
• Must be flexible, forward-thinking, motivated, and have the ability to act independently while balancing a broad range of organizational needs Proficient computer skills using Windows, MS-Office, and other PC based software.
• Relevant experience in life sciences/laboratory instrumentation production, GMP, GLP, QC, IQ/OQ/PQ, 5S, lean manufacturing, ISO 9001 environment and tools – ERP, Work Order, Batch Record, Arena, Oracle, QMS etc.

job_title: Full Stack Developer - Product Configuration Solutions (f/m/d)
job_description:
• Serve as an internal IS consultant, aligning innovative solutions with business needs while collaborating with stakeholders, solution consultants, and partners to deliver high-quality outcomes.
• Degree in Software Engineering, IT, or related field (HTL, FH, University) or equivalent practical experience.
• Ability to demonstrate your experience in software engineering and IT, with established skills in designing and implementing robust solutions.
• Develop and customize product configurators within IQ, ensuring robust functionality and user-friendly design.
• Integrate IQ with enterprise systems to enable end-to-end process automation.
• Manage the full configurator lifecycle—from architecture and implementation to maintenance, troubleshooting, and continuous improvement.
• Interest and affinity for automation products and the drive to create user-friendly configurators that simplify complex processes.
• Teamplayer and open-minded personYou are at ease communicating in German and English (spoken and written).

• Providing Export Control (ECCN/ECN) and Customs (HTS/HS tariff code, Preferential/Non Preferential Origin) classification of products, software, and/or technologies as part of new product introduction cycleManaging and updating master data for products, technologies, and software, including product description, and/or supporting customs declarants with product information required for master data management and entriesSupporting relevant teams (Procurement, Order Handling, R&D, Customs, Sales etc…) regarding product classification-related inquiries or issuesReviewing and applying relevant changes in the regulatory framework related to product classificationWhen working in a local Business, the PCE has a functional reporting line to the Local Trade Compliance Officer, and occasionally may be approached by the country trade compliance officer to support the classification of an item on ad hoc basis You have good knowledge or a strong willingness to learn about ELSP products, software, technologies, and classification processes.
• You have solid skills in MS Office and SAP, and you are well organized, precise, and diligent in data management and documentation.
• You have good knowledge about customs and export control regulations.
• You are business-oriented, proactive, flexible, and able to work independently while remaining a strong team player.
• You are at ease communicating in Italian and English.
